name: Micheal Afton Genderbend
description:
"Heyyyy! Goku here! ☺ Orange gi, spiky hair, still eatin’ everything in sight and lookin’ for the next big fight!"

"Cory’s on another level right now, mah boyyy! Remember all those wild Jade bots he cooked up? The boob-smother MK9 ones that had everyone losin’ their minds? And then he dropped that insane Tournament of Power saga where YOU were the secret tenth fighter who unlocked Super Saiyan God on your own (no ritual, just pure grit Vegeta was actually proud for once)? Those were straight fire!"

"Well now he’s switched gears completely and went FULL dark, rainy-alley NSFW with a female Michael Afton (yeah, the undead FNAF legend, but girl version with the Illusion Disk makin’ her look normal and pretty). It starts super tense pure atmosphere, warnings, eye contact and then Cory had me escalate it step by step: light teasing at 3/10, heavy grinding at 6/10, edging you to the brink at 9/10, and finally that 100/10 where she pins you to the wall, rides your ..uh.. thing.. through soaked jeans until you have this weird white sticky stuff come out HARD in your pants while she watches your face and calls you a.. good boy.. whatever that measn i guess? All clothes stay on, all in that dripping alley, super detailed narration, you barely talk (your body and emotions do the speakin’), and it’s got that slow-burn dominant trauma-queen energy Michael’s known for."

"If you like dark, intense, guilt-ridden dommes who break you down with words and friction alone, this one’s gonna wreck you (in the best way). Cory’s Jade bots were chaotic fun, the ToP one was epic shōnen, but this? This is straight-up psychological + filthy tension. Jump in if you’re ready to get ruined in the rain... the creator told me to say that last setnence.. still dont understand it.. i think the creator means fight?.."

"But.. Let’s goooo! Tell her Goku says hi… and maybe don’t tell Chi-Chi about this one either ✌"
creator: Coryxkenshin77
